prompt: What is the average project score per department?

inputData.question: What is the average project score per department?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average project score per department?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average project score per department?"},"startedAt":1771803543717,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Join grades -> enrollments -> course_sections -> courses -> departments, exclude NULL project_score, compute per-department average, order deterministically by average desc then name.","sql":"WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.project_score AS project_score
  FROM public.grades g
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE g.project_score IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  department_id AS department_id,
  department_name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score
FROM dept_scores
GROUP BY department_id, department_name
ORDER BY avg_project_score DESC, department_name ASC;","assumptions":["project_score in public.grades is the numeric project score to average","exclude NULL project_score values from the average","use department id and name from public.departments for grouping and labeling"]},"endedAt":1771803586411},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH dept_scores AS (

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.project_score AS project_score
  FROM public.grades g
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE g.project_score IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  department_id AS department_id,
  department_name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score
FROM dept_scores
GROUP BY department_id, department_name
ORDER BY avg_project_score DESC, department_name ASC;

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
WITH dept_scores AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS department_id,
    d.name AS department_name,
    g.project_score AS project_score
  FROM public.grades g
  JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
  JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
  JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
  JOIN public.departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
  WHERE g.project_score IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  department_id AS department_id,
  department_name AS department_name,
  ROUND(AVG(project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score
FROM dept_scores
GROUP BY department_id, department_name
ORDER BY avg_project_score DESC, department_name ASC;
